text: Hello. Hi. Can I help you? Hello. Good afternoon. This is Rachel, so I'm calling because they're pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Missouri State Relief Program. So have you received any notification about these benefits yet? This is a business and I thank you for your call. Have a lovely day.
